# ralph-claude-code

> > **Autonomous AI development loop with intelligent exit detection and rate limiting**

- Version: 2.8.3
- License: MIT
- Homepage: https://github.com/frankbria/ralph-claude-code#readme

## Tech Stack

- Node.js
- GitHub Actions

## Entry Points

- `sdk/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pydantic/main.py`
- `sdk/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pydantic/v1/main.py`
- `sdk/ralph_sdk/__main__.py`

## Key Files

- `README.md`
- `CLAUDE.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `LICENSE`
- `package.json`
- `.tapps-mcp.yaml`
